name: HB Stockholdings Limited
summary: HB Stockholdings Limited, a non-banking financial company, engages in the investment and finance activities in India. It is involved in the investment, purchase, and sale of securities. The company was formerly known as HB Portfolio Leasing Limited and changed its name to HB Stockholdings Limited in February 1997. HB Stockholdings Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Gurugram, India.
